name: I Am Devil
original_name: เตือนแล้วนะ... ว่าฉันร้าย
overview: Mookmanee is an actress famous for playing villains. Her career took off in a reality show, where she became a partner of Grace, both in fiction and in real life. However, their relationship ended when Grace's mother forced Mookmanee to leave her. Mookmanee was so disappointed that she lost faith in love. Since then, she became indifferent to relationships, seeking solace in casual flings, frequenting the Hera Club, an exclusive club for sapphic women, even after getting engaged to a man. Things get complicated when she encounters her soon-to-be sister-in-law Prangdao.
